Source: Vertex AI Release Notes
URL: https://cloud.google.com/vertex-ai/docs/release-notes
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Vertex AI Release Notes - Content Summary

## Latest Major Announcements (March 2026)

**Vector Search 2.0 GA**: A retrieval engine now generally available featuring collections, auto-embeddings, hybrid search capabilities, and Private Service Connect support.

**Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite Preview**: Described as "the most cost-efficient Gemini model" optimized for low-latency, high-volume use cases.

**Video Generation Endpoint Deprecations**: Multiple preview endpoints for Veo video generation models are deprecated; users must migrate by April 2, 2026.

## Recent Model Releases (February-March 2026)

- **Gemini 3.1 Flash Image** (preview): High-quality image generation with improved pricing
- **Gemini 3.1 Pro** (preview): Advanced reasoning model with 1M token context window
- **Claude Sonnet 4.6 & Claude Opus 4.6**: Available in Model Garden
- **Virtual Try-On**: Now generally available with endpoint `virtual-try-on-001`

## Key Deprecations & Retirements

- Vertex Explainable AI deprecated (March 16, 2026)
- Claude 3 Haiku shutting down August 23, 2026
- Claude 3.5 Haiku shutting down July 5, 2026
- Feature Store Optimized online serving deprecated (February 17, 2026)
- Multiple image generation preview endpoints retiring March 19, 2026

## Agent Engine & Workbench Updates

**Vertex AI Agent Engine**: Code Execution now generally available; Sessions and Memory Bank became GA December 17, 2025; supports bidirectional streaming and A2A protocol.

**Workbench M139**: Most recent release removing startup script dependencies on `gs://dl-platform-public-configs`.

## Evaluation & Development Tools

Gen AI evaluation service now supports partner model evaluations (Anthropic, Llama models). Prompt management capabilities available through Vertex AI SDK for storing and versioning prompts.

## Infrastructure & Security

- Private Service Connect interface support expanded
- Confidential Computing (VM) support for Workbench now GA
- Customer-managed encryption keys (CMEK) supported for Agent Engine
- HIPAA compliance support added for Agent Engine

## Pricing Changes

Vertex AI Agent Engine Runtime pricing reduced effective various dates; Sessions, Memory Bank, and Code Execution charging begins February 11, 2026 (delayed from January 28).
